summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Sr-Renovation iteration 2 features: remise_montant (flat discount), diagnostic on PDF, no surface field, desktop navigation, lighter blue colors. All 15 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests successful - all new features working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed clients, quotes, and invoices during testing to verify new discount logic and diagnostic features
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 2 features verified: 1) remise_montant (flat € discount) works - 200€ on 1690€ = 1490€ net, 2) remise_percent (%) still works - 10% on 1000€ = 100€ off, net = 900€, 3) % takes priority over flat when both provided, 4) Diagnostic checkboxes appear on PDF preview when checked, 5) No surface field in forms, 6) Desktop navigation visible with all 5 items (Accueil, Devis, Factures, Clients, Catalogue), 7) Active page highlighted in nav with blue gradient, 8) Invoice acompte_paid and reste_a_payer calculations correct, 9) Lighter blue colors (#3b82f6 gradient to orange) applied throughout.

remise_montant_flat_discount.quote: 200€ flat on 1690€ total = 1490€ net, acompte 30% = 447€ CORRECT

remise_percent_discount.invoice: 10% on 2000€ = 200€ off, net = 1800€, acompte 500€ = reste 1300€ CORRECT

features_verified.discount_priority: When remise_percent > 0, it takes priority over remise_montant VERIFIED
features_verified.diagnostic_on_pdf: Diagnostic checkboxes visible on PDF preview with checkmarks for checked items (Mousses, Lichens, Tuiles cassées, Faîtage, Gouttières, Façade)
features_verified.no_surface_field: Surface field removed from both QuoteForm and InvoiceForm VERIFIED
features_verified.desktop_navigation: Visible with 5 items: Accueil, Devis, Factures, Clients, Catalogue. Active page highlighted with blue gradient background
features_verified.lighter_blue_colors: Header uses linear-gradient(135deg, #3b82f6, #60a5fa, #f59e0b) - lighter blue tones VERIFIED
features_verified.invoice_calculations: acompte_paid and reste_a_payer work correctly with both % and flat discounts
